016package edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.service.repository;
017
018import androidx.lifecycle.LiveData;
019import edu.cnm.deepdive.pixelcreate.model.entity.Project;
020import java.util.List;
021import java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture;
022
023/**
024 * Repository interface for {@link Project} entity operations. Provides methods for project
025 * creation, retrieval, update, and deletion.
026 */
027public interface ProjectRepository {
028
029  /**
030   * Saves or updates a project in the database.
031   *
032   * @param project Project entity to save.
033   * @return CompletableFuture containing the saved Project with generated ID.
034   */
035  CompletableFuture<Project> save(Project project);
036
037  /**
038   * Retrieves a project by its unique identifier.
039   *
040   * @param id Project ID.
041   * @return LiveData containing the Project, or null if not found.
042   */
043  LiveData<Project> getById(long id);
044
045  /**
046   * Retrieves all projects for a specific user.
047   *
048   * @param userId User ID.
049   * @return LiveData containing a list of Projects.
050   */
051  LiveData<List<Project>> getAllByUserId(long userId);
052
053  /**
054   * Retrieves all non-deleted projects for a specific user.
055   *
056   * @param userId User ID.
057   * @return LiveData containing a list of Projects.
058   */
059  LiveData<List<Project>> getActiveByUserId(long userId);
060
061  /**
062   * Deletes a project from the database.
063   *
064   * @param project Project entity to delete.
065   * @return CompletableFuture that completes when deletion is finished.
066   */
067  CompletableFuture<Void> delete(Project project);
068
069}
